videos.title: HTML Datalist Element - Web Dev Simplified
videos.description: Learn how to use the HTML datalist element to create autocomplete dropdowns for input fields with predefined options.

videos.title: HTML Datalist vs Select - freeCodeCamp
videos.description: Comparison between HTML datalist and select elements, understanding when to use each for form inputs.

videos.title: HTML5 Datalist Tutorial - Traversy Media
videos.description: Brad Traversy walks through the HTML5 datalist element and how to implement it with input fields.

videos.title: Datalist and Autocomplete - Kevin Powell
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains how to style and use the datalist element for better user experience in forms.

videos.title: HTML Input and Datalist - MDN Web Docs
videos.description: Mozilla Developer Network official guide on using the datalist element with various input types.
